member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Exceptions.HonuaAdminApiException
member.summary: Exception thrown when the Honua Admin API returns an error HTTP status code.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Exceptions.HonuaAdminApiException.StatusCode
member.summary: HTTP status code returned by the server.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Exceptions.HonuaAdminApiException.ResponseBody
member.summary: The raw response body, if available.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Exceptions.HonuaAdminApiException.#ctor(System.Net.HttpStatusCode,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The HTTP status code returned by the server.
The raw response body, if available.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Exceptions.HonuaAdminApiException.#ctor(System.Net.HttpStatusCode,System.String,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with an inner exception.
member.param: The HTTP status code returned by the server.
The raw response body, if available.
The inner exception that caused this exception.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Exceptions.HonuaAdminOperationException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a Honua Admin operation fails at the application level.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Exceptions.HonuaAdminOperationException.Operation
member.summary: The operation that failed.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Exceptions.HonuaAdminOperationException.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Exceptions.HonuaAdminOperationException.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with an inner exception.
member.param: The inner exception that caused this exception.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering the Honua Admin client with dependency injection.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddHonuaAdmin(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Honua.Sdk.Admin.HonuaAdminClientOptions})
member.summary: Registers the Honua Admin client and related services with the DI container.
member.param: The service collection to register with.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.HonuaAdminAuthHandler
member.summary: Delegating handler that adds authentication headers to admin API requests.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.HonuaAdminAuthHandler.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Honua.Sdk.Admin.HonuaAdminClientOptions})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The admin client options containing authentication credentials.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.HonuaAdminClient
member.summary: HTTP client implementation for the Honua Admin REST API.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.HonuaAdminClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The HTTP client configured with base address and auth handlers.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.HonuaAdminClientOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for the Honua Admin client.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.HonuaAdminClientOptions.BaseAddress
member.summary: Base address of the Honua server.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.HonuaAdminClientOptions.ApiKey
member.summary: API key for admin authentication.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.HonuaAdminClientOptions.BearerToken
member.summary: Bearer token for authentication.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient
member.summary: Client interface for the Honua Admin REST API.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.ListServicesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all registered services.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.GetServiceSettingsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the settings for a specific service.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.UpdateProtocolsAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates the enabled protocols for a service.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.UpdateMapServerSettingsAsync(System.String,Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateMapServerSettingsRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates the MapServer rendering settings for a service.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.UpdateAccessPolicyAsync(System.String,Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateAccessPolicyRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates the access policy for a service.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.UpdateTimeInfoAsync(System.String,Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateTimeInfoRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates temporal metadata for a service.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.UpdateLayerMetadataAsync(System.String,System.Int32,Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateLayerMetadataRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates metadata for a specific layer within a service.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.ListMetadataResourcesAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists metadata resources, optionally filtered by kind and namespace.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.GetMetadataResourceAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a specific metadata resource by its identifier.
member.returns: A tuple containing the resource and its ETag (if present).

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.CreateMetadataResourceAsync(Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataResource,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new metadata resource.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.UpdateMetadataResourceAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataResource,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing metadata resource.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.DeleteMetadataResourceAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a metadata resource.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.GetVersionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the admin API version information.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.GetCapabilitiesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the admin API capabilities.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.GetManifestAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exports the metadata manifest.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.ApplyManifestAsync(Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplyRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Applies a metadata manifest.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.ListConnectionsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all secure database connections.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.GetConnectionAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets detailed information about a secure database connection.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.CreateConnectionAsync(Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.CreateSecureConnectionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new secure database connection.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.TestDraftConnectionAsync(Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.CreateSecureConnectionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tests a draft connection before saving.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.UpdateConnectionAsync(System.String,Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateSecureConnectionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing secure database connection.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.TestConnectionAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tests the health of an existing connection.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.DeleteConnectionAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a secure database connection.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.ValidateEncryptionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates the encryption service.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.RotateEncryptionKeyAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Rotates the encryption key.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.ListLayersAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists published layers for a connection.
member.returns: A list of published layer summaries.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.PublishLayerAsync(System.String,Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishLayerRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes a PostGIS table as a layer.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.SetLayerEnabledAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enables or disables a specific layer.
member.param: Whether the layer should be enabled.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.SetServiceLayersEnabledAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enables or disables all layers for a service.
member.param: Whether the layers should be enabled.
member.returns: A list of updated layer summaries.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.DiscoverTablesAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Discovers PostGIS tables available on a connection.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.GetLayerStyleAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the style for a layer.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.UpdateLayerStyleAsync(System.Int32,Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.LayerStyleUpdateRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates the style for a layer.

member.name: M:Honua.Sdk.Admin.IHonuaAdminClient.GetConfigAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the server configuration documentation.
member.returns: The configuration as a JSON element.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ApiResponse`1
member.summary: Generic API response envelope returned by the Honua Admin API.
member.typeparam: Type of the response data payload.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ApiResponse`1.Success
member.summary: Whether the request was successful.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ApiResponse`1.Data
member.summary: The response data payload.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ApiResponse`1.Message
member.summary: Optional message about the response.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ApiResponse`1.Timestamp
member.summary: Timestamp when the response was generated.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishLayerRequest
member.summary: Request payload for publishing a PostGIS table as a layer.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishLayerRequest.Schema
member.summary: Schema containing the source table.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishLayerRequest.Table
member.summary: Source table name.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishLayerRequest.LayerName
member.summary: Display name for the layer.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishLayerRequest.Description
member.summary: Optional layer description.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishLayerRequest.GeometryColumn
member.summary: Geometry column name.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishLayerRequest.GeometryType
member.summary: Geometry type (Point, Polygon, etc).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishLayerRequest.Srid
member.summary: Spatial reference identifier.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishLayerRequest.PrimaryKey
member.summary: Primary key field name.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishLayerRequest.Fields
member.summary: Selected attribute fields to publish (empty means include all).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishLayerRequest.ServiceName
member.summary: Optional service name (defaults to "default").

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishLayerRequest.Enabled
member.summary: Whether to enable the layer after publishing.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishedLayerSummary
member.summary: Summary information about a published layer.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishedLayerSummary.LayerId
member.summary: Layer identifier.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishedLayerSummary.LayerName
member.summary: Layer display name.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishedLayerSummary.Schema
member.summary: Database schema containing the source table.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishedLayerSummary.Table
member.summary: Source table name.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishedLayerSummary.Description
member.summary: Optional layer description.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishedLayerSummary.GeometryType
member.summary: Geometry type (Point, Polygon, etc).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishedLayerSummary.Srid
member.summary: Spatial reference identifier.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishedLayerSummary.PrimaryKey
member.summary: Primary key field name.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishedLayerSummary.FieldCount
member.summary: Number of attribute fields published.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishedLayerSummary.Enabled
member.summary: Whether the layer is enabled.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.PublishedLayerSummary.ServiceName
member.summary: Service name the layer belongs to.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.LayerEnabledRequest
member.summary: Request payload for enabling/disabling a layer.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.LayerEnabledRequest.Enabled
member.summary: Whether the layer should be enabled.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.LayerStyleResponse
member.summary: Response payload containing layer styles.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.LayerStyleResponse.MapLibreStyle
member.summary: MapLibre style JSON (canonical format).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.LayerStyleResponse.DrawingInfo
member.summary: GeoServices drawingInfo JSON (cached conversion or import).

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.LayerStyleUpdateRequest
member.summary: Request payload for updating a layer style.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.LayerStyleUpdateRequest.MapLibreStyle
member.summary: MapLibre style JSON (canonical format).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.LayerStyleUpdateRequest.DrawingInfo
member.summary: GeoServices drawingInfo JSON (import/compat).

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataManifest
member.summary: Response payload for admin metadata manifest export.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataManifest.ApiVersion
member.summary: API version of the manifest payload.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataManifest.GeneratedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the manifest was generated.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataManifest.Resources
member.summary: Resources included in the manifest.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataManifest.DriftedResources
member.summary: Resource identifiers that have drifted since the last applied manifest.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataManifest.ManifestHash
member.summary: Hash of the manifest content for change detection.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplyRequest
member.summary: Request payload for applying a metadata manifest.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplyRequest.Resources
member.summary: Resources to apply.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplyRequest.DryRun
member.summary: When true, no changes are persisted.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplyRequest.Prune
member.summary: When true, resources not present in the manifest are removed.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplyResult
member.summary: Result payload for manifest apply operations.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplyResult.DryRun
member.summary: Indicates whether the apply was a dry run.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplyResult.Summary
member.summary: Summary counts for applied changes.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplyResult.Entries
member.summary: Entries describing per-resource actions.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplySummary
member.summary: Summary of manifest apply actions.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplySummary.Created
member.summary: Number of resources created.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplySummary.Updated
member.summary: Number of resources updated.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplySummary.Deleted
member.summary: Number of resources deleted.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplySummary.Skipped
member.summary: Number of resources skipped (no change).

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplyEntry
member.summary: Manifest apply entry describing a single resource action.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplyEntry.Action
member.summary: Action performed (create/update/delete/skip).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplyEntry.Resource
member.summary: Resource identifier.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ManifestApplyEntry.Message
member.summary: Optional message for the entry.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.AdminVersionResponse
member.summary: Admin version information response.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.AdminVersionResponse.Version
member.summary: Server version string.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.AdminVersionResponse.MetadataApiVersion
member.summary: Metadata API version supported by the server.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.AdminVersionResponse.ServerTime
member.summary: Server time in UTC.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.AdminCapabilitiesResponse
member.summary: Admin capabilities response payload.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.AdminCapabilitiesResponse.MetadataApiVersions
member.summary: Supported metadata API versions.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.AdminCapabilitiesResponse.ResourceKinds
member.summary: Supported resource kinds.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.AdminCapabilitiesResponse.ManifestSupported
member.summary: Indicates manifest export/apply support.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.AdminCapabilitiesResponse.ManifestDryRunSupported
member.summary: Indicates whether dry-run is supported for manifest apply.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.AdminCapabilitiesResponse.ManifestPruneSupported
member.summary: Indicates whether prune is supported for manifest apply.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataResource
member.summary: Represents a versioned metadata resource envelope with spec and status separation.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataResource.ApiVersion
member.summary: API version for the resource schema (e.g. "honua.io/v1alpha1").

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataResource.Kind
member.summary: Resource kind (e.g. "Layer", "Service").

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataResource.Metadata
member.summary: Resource metadata including identity and versioning.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataResource.Spec
member.summary: Desired state for the resource.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataResource.Status
member.summary: Computed or observed state for the resource.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ResourceMetadata
member.summary: Metadata fields common to all resources, including identity and versioning.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ResourceMetadata.Id
member.summary: Stable resource identifier.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ResourceMetadata.Name
member.summary: Human-readable name within the namespace.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ResourceMetadata.Namespace
member.summary: Namespace for grouping resources.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ResourceMetadata.Labels
member.summary: Key-value labels for selection and grouping.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ResourceMetadata.Annotations
member.summary: Free-form annotations for tooling and audit metadata.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ResourceMetadata.ResourceVersion
member.summary: Monotonic resource version for optimistic concurrency.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ResourceMetadata.Generation
member.summary: Generation number that increments when spec changes.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ResourceMetadata.CreatedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the resource was created.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ResourceMetadata.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the resource was last updated.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataResourceIdentifier
member.summary: Identifies a metadata resource by kind, namespace, and name.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataResourceIdentifier.Kind
member.summary: Resource kind.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataResourceIdentifier.Namespace
member.summary: Resource namespace.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MetadataResourceIdentifier.Name
member.summary: Resource name.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary
member.summary: Summary information about a secure database connection (safe for API responses).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary.ConnectionId
member.summary: Unique identifier for the connection.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary.Name
member.summary: Human-readable name for the connection.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary.Description
member.summary: Optional description of the connection.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary.Host
member.summary: Database server hostname.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary.Port
member.summary: Database server port.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary.DatabaseName
member.summary: Database name.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary.Username
member.summary: Database username.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary.SslRequired
member.summary: Whether SSL/TLS is required.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary.SslMode
member.summary: SSL connection mode.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary.StorageType
member.summary: Type of credential storage (managed or external reference).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the connection is currently active.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary.HealthStatus
member.summary: Current health status.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary.LastHealthCheck
member.summary: Last time a health check was performed.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary.CreatedAt
member.summary: When the connection was created.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionSummary.CreatedBy
member.summary: Who created the connection.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionDetail
member.summary: Detailed information about a secure database connection.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionDetail.CredentialReference
member.summary: Credential reference (if using external secret storage).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionDetail.EncryptionVersion
member.summary: Encryption version used (if using managed storage).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.SecureConnectionDetail.UpdatedAt
member.summary: When the connection was last updated.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.CreateSecureConnectionRequest
member.summary: Request model for creating a new secure database connection.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.CreateSecureConnectionRequest.Name
member.summary: Human-readable name for the connection (must be unique).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.CreateSecureConnectionRequest.Description
member.summary: Optional description of the connection.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.CreateSecureConnectionRequest.Host
member.summary: Database server hostname or IP address.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.CreateSecureConnectionRequest.Port
member.summary: Database server port number.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.CreateSecureConnectionRequest.DatabaseName
member.summary: Database name to connect to.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.CreateSecureConnectionRequest.Username
member.summary: Database username.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.CreateSecureConnectionRequest.Password
member.summary: Database password (used only for encrypted storage, not persisted in logs).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.CreateSecureConnectionRequest.SecretReference
member.summary: External secret manager reference (alternative to Password).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.CreateSecureConnectionRequest.SecretType
member.summary: Type of secret management system (required when using SecretReference).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.CreateSecureConnectionRequest.SslRequired
member.summary: Whether SSL/TLS is required for this connection.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.CreateSecureConnectionRequest.SslMode
member.summary: SSL mode for the connection.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateSecureConnectionRequest
member.summary: Request model for updating an existing secure database connection.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateSecureConnectionRequest.Description
member.summary: Optional description of the connection.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateSecureConnectionRequest.Host
member.summary: Database server hostname or IP address.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateSecureConnectionRequest.Port
member.summary: Database server port number.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateSecureConnectionRequest.DatabaseName
member.summary: Database name to connect to.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateSecureConnectionRequest.Username
member.summary: Database username.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateSecureConnectionRequest.Password
member.summary: New database password (optional, only for re-encrypting credentials).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateSecureConnectionRequest.SslRequired
member.summary: Whether SSL/TLS is required for this connection.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateSecureConnectionRequest.SslMode
member.summary: SSL mode for the connection.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateSecureConnectionRequest.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the connection is active.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ConnectionTestResult
member.summary: Result of a connection health test.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ConnectionTestResult.ConnectionId
member.summary: ID of the connection that was tested.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ConnectionTestResult.ConnectionName
member.summary: Name of the connection that was tested.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ConnectionTestResult.IsHealthy
member.summary: Whether the connection test was successful.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ConnectionTestResult.TestedAt
member.summary: When the test was performed.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ConnectionTestResult.Message
member.summary: Human-readable test result message.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.EncryptionValidationResult
member.summary: Result of encryption service validation.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.EncryptionValidationResult.IsValid
member.summary: Whether the encryption service is working correctly.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.EncryptionValidationResult.CurrentKeyVersion
member.summary: Current encryption key version.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.EncryptionValidationResult.ValidatedAt
member.summary: When the validation was performed.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.EncryptionValidationResult.Message
member.summary: Human-readable validation result message.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.KeyRotationResult
member.summary: Result of encryption key rotation.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.KeyRotationResult.PreviousKeyVersion
member.summary: Previous key version.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.KeyRotationResult.NewKeyVersion
member.summary: New key version after rotation.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.KeyRotationResult.RotatedAt
member.summary: When the key rotation was performed.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.KeyRotationResult.Message
member.summary: Human-readable rotation result message.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ServiceSummary
member.summary: Lightweight service summary for the service list endpoint.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ServiceSummary.ServiceName
member.summary: The service name.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ServiceSummary.Description
member.summary: The service description.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ServiceSummary.LayerCount
member.summary: Number of layers in the service.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ServiceSummary.EnabledProtocols
member.summary: Protocols enabled for this service.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ServiceSettingsResponse
member.summary: Response model for service settings including protocols and MapServer configuration.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ServiceSettingsResponse.ServiceName
member.summary: The service name.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ServiceSettingsResponse.EnabledProtocols
member.summary: Protocols currently enabled for this service.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ServiceSettingsResponse.AvailableProtocols
member.summary: Protocols supported by this server build.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ServiceSettingsResponse.AccessPolicy
member.summary: Access policy for the service.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ServiceSettingsResponse.TimeInfo
member.summary: Temporal metadata for time-aware layers.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ServiceSettingsResponse.MapServer
member.summary: MapServer rendering configuration.

member.summary: Access policy for the layer.

member.summary: Temporal metadata for the layer.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.AccessPolicyResponse
member.summary: Access policy response model.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.AccessPolicyResponse.AllowAnonymous
member.summary: Whether anonymous access is allowed.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.AccessPolicyResponse.AllowAnonymousWrite
member.summary: Whether anonymous write access is allowed.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.AccessPolicyResponse.AllowedRoles
member.summary: Allowed role names for access.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.AccessPolicyResponse.AllowedWriteRoles
member.summary: Allowed role names for write access.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.TimeInfoResponse
member.summary: Temporal metadata response model.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.TimeInfoResponse.StartTimeField
member.summary: Field name containing the start time.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.TimeInfoResponse.EndTimeField
member.summary: Field name containing the end time.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.TimeInfoResponse.TrackIdField
member.summary: Track identifier field for temporal visualization.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MapServerSettingsResponse
member.summary: MapServer rendering settings for a service.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MapServerSettingsResponse.MaxImageWidth
member.summary: Maximum allowed image width in pixels.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MapServerSettingsResponse.MaxImageHeight
member.summary: Maximum allowed image height in pixels.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MapServerSettingsResponse.DefaultImageWidth
member.summary: Default image width when not specified.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MapServerSettingsResponse.DefaultImageHeight
member.summary: Default image height when not specified.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MapServerSettingsResponse.DefaultDpi
member.summary: Default DPI for rendered images.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MapServerSettingsResponse.DefaultFormat
member.summary: Default output format.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MapServerSettingsResponse.DefaultTransparent
member.summary: Whether the background is transparent by default.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.MapServerSettingsResponse.MaxFeaturesPerLayer
member.summary: Maximum features rendered per layer.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateProtocolsRequest
member.summary: Request to update enabled protocols for a service.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateProtocolsRequest.EnabledProtocols
member.summary: Protocols to enable. Valid values: "FeatureServer", "MapServer", "OgcFeatures", "OData", "Grpc".

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateMapServerSettingsRequest
member.summary: Request to update MapServer rendering settings. Null fields are not updated.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateMapServerSettingsRequest.MaxImageWidth
member.summary: Maximum allowed image width in pixels.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateMapServerSettingsRequest.MaxImageHeight
member.summary: Maximum allowed image height in pixels.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateMapServerSettingsRequest.DefaultImageWidth
member.summary: Default image width when not specified.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateMapServerSettingsRequest.DefaultImageHeight
member.summary: Default image height when not specified.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateMapServerSettingsRequest.DefaultDpi
member.summary: Default DPI for rendered images.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateMapServerSettingsRequest.DefaultFormat
member.summary: Default output format.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateMapServerSettingsRequest.DefaultTransparent
member.summary: Whether the background is transparent by default.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateMapServerSettingsRequest.MaxFeaturesPerLayer
member.summary: Maximum features rendered per layer.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateAccessPolicyRequest
member.summary: Request to update the access policy for a service.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateAccessPolicyRequest.AllowAnonymous
member.summary: Whether anonymous access is allowed.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateAccessPolicyRequest.AllowAnonymousWrite
member.summary: Whether anonymous write access is allowed.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateAccessPolicyRequest.AllowedRoles
member.summary: Allowed role names for access.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateAccessPolicyRequest.AllowedWriteRoles
member.summary: Allowed role names for write access.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateTimeInfoRequest
member.summary: Request to update the time info for a service.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateTimeInfoRequest.StartTimeField
member.summary: Field name containing the start time. Empty string clears the value.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateTimeInfoRequest.EndTimeField
member.summary: Field name containing the end time. Empty string clears the value.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateTimeInfoRequest.TrackIdField
member.summary: Track identifier field. Empty string clears the value.

member.summary: Request to update layer metadata.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateLayerMetadataRequest.AccessPolicy
member.summary: Access policy updates.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.UpdateLayerMetadataRequest.TimeInfo
member.summary: Time info updates.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.TableDiscoveryResponse
member.summary: Response from table discovery endpoint.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.TableDiscoveryResponse.Tables
member.summary: List of discovered tables.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.TableInfo
member.summary: Information about a discovered table with spatial data.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.TableInfo.Schema
member.summary: Database schema name (e.g., "public").

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.TableInfo.Table
member.summary: Table name.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.TableInfo.GeometryColumn
member.summary: Name of the geometry column.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.TableInfo.GeometryType
member.summary: Geometry type (e.g., POINT, POLYGON, MULTIPOLYGON).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.TableInfo.Srid
member.summary: Spatial Reference Identifier (SRID).

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.TableInfo.EstimatedRows
member.summary: Estimated row count.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.TableInfo.Columns
member.summary: All columns in the table.

member.name: T:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ColumnInfo
member.summary: Information about a table column.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ColumnInfo.Name
member.summary: Column name.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ColumnInfo.DataType
member.summary: Column data type.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ColumnInfo.IsNullable
member.summary: Whether the column allows null values.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ColumnInfo.IsPrimaryKey
member.summary: Whether this is a primary key column.

member.name: P:Honua.Sdk.Admin.Models.ColumnInfo.MaxLength
member.summary: Maximum length for character types.
